name: create_insert
setup: CREATE TABLE {t} (id int, grp varchar, amt double)
verify: SELECT id, grp, amt FROM {t} ORDER BY id

name: ctas
setup: CREATE TABLE {t} AS SELECT nationkey, name, regionkey FROM nation
verify: SELECT regionkey, count(*) c FROM {t} GROUP BY regionkey ORDER BY regionkey

name: insert_from_select
setup: INSERT INTO {t} SELECT regionkey, name FROM region
verify: SELECT rk, rn FROM {t} ORDER BY rk

name: insert_multi_batch
verify: SELECT count(*), sum(id) FROM {t}

name: update_rows
setup: CREATE TABLE {t} (id int, grp varchar, amt double)
UPDATE {t} SET amt = amt + 100 WHERE grp='a'
verify: SELECT id, amt FROM {t} ORDER BY id

name: delete_rows
verify: SELECT id FROM {t} ORDER BY id

name: merge_table_source
setup: MERGE INTO {t} tgt USING (SELECT nationkey AS id, name AS val FROM nation WHERE nationkey IN (2,9)) src ON tgt.id=src.id WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET val=src.val WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (id,val) VALUES (src.id, src.val)
verify: SELECT id, val FROM {t} ORDER BY id

name: create_like_insert
setup: INSERT INTO {t} SELECT * FROM nation WHERE regionkey=1
verify: SELECT nationkey, name FROM {t} ORDER BY nationkey

name: partitioned_write
setup: CREATE TABLE {t} (id int, grp varchar, amt double) WITH (partitioning = ARRAY['grp'])
verify: SELECT grp, count(*), round(sum(amt),2) FROM {t} GROUP BY grp ORDER BY grp

name: alter_drop_column
setup: CREATE TABLE {t} (id int, a varchar, b int)
verify: SELECT id, a FROM {t} ORDER BY id

name: alter_set_properties
verify: SELECT count(*) FROM {t}

name: meta_snapshots_readable
verify: SELECT count(*) > 0 FROM {snaptbl}

name: meta_history_readable
verify: SELECT count(*) > 0 FROM {histtbl}

name: io_sqe_write_read
setup: CREATE TABLE {t} (id int, grp varchar, amt double)
verify: SELECT id, grp, amt FROM {t} ORDER BY id

name: io_trino_write_read
setup: CREATE TABLE {t} (id int, grp varchar, amt double)
verify: SELECT id, grp, amt FROM {t} ORDER BY id

name: io_sqe_ctas
setup: CREATE TABLE {t} AS SELECT custkey, name, acctbal FROM customer WHERE nationkey=1
verify: SELECT count(*), round(sum(acctbal),2) FROM {t}

name: io_trino_partitioned
setup: CREATE TABLE {t} (id int, grp varchar) WITH (partitioning = ARRAY['grp'])
verify: SELECT grp, count(*) FROM {t} GROUP BY grp ORDER BY grp

name: io_sqe_update_read
setup: UPDATE {t} SET amt = amt * 2 WHERE id <= 2
verify: SELECT id, amt FROM {t} ORDER BY id

name: io_trino_delete_read
verify: SELECT id FROM {t} ORDER BY id

name: io_sqe_merge_read
setup: MERGE INTO {t} tgt USING (SELECT regionkey AS id, name AS val FROM region WHERE regionkey IN (2,5)) src ON tgt.id=src.id WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET val=src.val WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (id,val) VALUES (src.id, src.val)
verify: SELECT id, val FROM {t} ORDER BY id
